positive_prompt:
pixel art, 32x32 style, top-down view, stone-age primitive, 16-color earthy palette, crisp pixels, no outline blur
enclosed stone hearth, ring of large stacked stones, controlled cooking fire, ash bed, simple spit of wood
negative_prompt: blurry, photo-realistic, 3d render, anti-aliasing, smooth gradients, text, watermark, signature, modern objects, metal, plastic, low quality
notes: Upgraded campfire; larger stone structure, more permanent.
